ab: kemuda na wari harem?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: aretid pakiwalay na wari, tare’au kana vi’as na danum.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: kemuda na wari harem?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: vi’as pakiwalay na wari, tare’au kana danum.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: kemuda na wari i pacalan?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: panana na kadaw, kilrivak da muvaci’a mu da kadaw.
ch: B:太陽很強，小心妳們曬焦了。
en: The sun is bright and be careful of getting sunburned.

ab: kemuda na wari i pacalan?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: kedemer na lunev, uniyan da kadaw i lukup.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: kuwadakuda na wari nu ’emanan awa?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: kauniyan da kadaw nu ’emanan, kasadu na lunev di paacev na vali kema.
ch: B:聽說明天會沒有太陽，雲很多，風會很強。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: kuwadakuda na wari nu adu awa?
en: How was the weather that time?

ab: kararetid pakiwalay nu adu, pikavang da pakaicas nu mupacalan ta.
ch: B:那天會有點冷，我們出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and we needed to wear a jacket when we went outside.

ab: kuwadakuda na wari nu kasede’an awa?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: ka’inava na wari nu kasede’an.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: ’a’udalr nu adu awlra?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: dadali’ lra na wari nu adu, adi lra ’a’udalr.
ch: B:那天天氣會變晴朗了，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: ’a’udalr nu adu awlra?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: ai, ’a’udalr nu adu.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: ’ema’udalr harem?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: madiyadi lra na ’udalr, mupacalan lra na kadaw.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: ’ema’udalr harem?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: ma’udalr lra, adi ku miinada da suku.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: ’ema’udalr i pacalan?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: adi ma’udalr harem, ’a’udalr nu piya ta kare’alri, pisuku nu muiyan ta.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，我們出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so we need to bring an umbrella when we go out.

ab: kararetid nu mare’ami na vuceliyan awlra?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: ai, nu mare’ami na vuceliyan mu, kararetid dadu, pikavang da sadu.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: kanini na ’ami nu derun mu, kavi’as awlra?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: ai, kavi’as nu derun, tare’au kana danum.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: sahar u kana kaseveran?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: sahar ku kana kaseveran, sadeku na wari.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: sahar u kana vencaceli?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: adi ku sahar kana vencaceli, sadu variw nu vencaceli.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
